title: Minor news about Shin Evangelion 3010
wikitext:
[]: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by fullfrontal.moe » Thu Oct 17, 2019 9:45 am Yesterday we shared some of the information we gathered about the movie on our twitter account . The information was gathered by talking with animator Se Jun Kim who is currently working on the movie. Nothing major, but I have to admit I can't stop thinking about what Mr. Kim told me, especially that bit about "It really feels like it's the end".

[]: Re: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Oct 17, 2019 9:47 am Thank you very much for posting it here First of all the movie will be around two hours long. It would be longer if it was possible, but this is a restriction imposed by the theaters so Anno works on cutting what he can to fit

[]: Re: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Jadley » Thu Oct 17, 2019 10:59 am Joseki wrote: Thank you very much for posting it here Well, they should sell the "uncut" version in the BD then.

[]: Re: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Oct 17, 2019 3:37 pm Furthermore the version shown in Paris and the version shown in Japan was different as I could witness myself

[]: Re: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Oct 17, 2019 5:26 pm I suspected Khara had better pay. There’s no way Anno lived under a desk at Gainax while working on Nadia just to be selfish with his own studio. Anno is a benevolent god.

[]: Re: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Thu Oct 17, 2019 6:15 pm Thank you very much for sharing this information!

[]: Re: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Oct 17, 2019 10:55 pm You just got a new Twitter follower! So we can expect a movie that will go right up to and maybe a little over 2 hours but not by much (I'd guess a runtime with credits that's between 110 to 125 minutes, easily making it the longest theatrical Eva film) and I also figured Khara may be open to Eva stuff continuing in the future (whether that's more manga or TV or film will be up to them) but Anno is done. I mean for Anno it makes sense. Unlike when Neon Genesis/EOE ended where he was still very much a (well-respected) anime director always on the hunt for a new gig, when he walks off Final he'll be coming off an insanely phenomenal run as writer/director of FIVE super successful films* and the head of his own production studio. The guy can pretty much do whatever he wants after this. Seeing the wild & uniquely original things he's been doing with established series like Eva & Godzilla I really would love to see him go wild with something entirely fresh and original. *Plus a sixth hit if Shinji Higuchi can deliver with Shin Ultraman.

[]: Re: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sat Oct 19, 2019 3:30 am 2 hours, huh? The movie is probably going to be dense and have a lot of content like 2.0 and will not have a slow build up like 1.0 and 3.0

[]: Re: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by fullfrontal.moe » Sat Oct 19, 2019 4:17 am To the request of M. Sejoon Kim, I deleted the tweets. Sorry for the inconvenience. Even if it wasn't much it was confidential info

[]: Re: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Oct 20, 2019 5:14 am ^ Thought as much, hopefully he can keep his job.

[]: Re: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Oct 20, 2019 7:43 pm Missed the boat on the info, but it's about 2 hours long? Good to know, at any rate. Anything else that wasn't posted here from the tweets?

[]: Re: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Oct 21, 2019 5:38 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Missed the boat on the info, but it's about 2 hours long? Good to know, at any rate. Anything else that wasn't posted here from the tweets?

[]: Re: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Cookie H Wilson » Mon Oct 21, 2019 1:53 pm Joseki wrote: I made a copy of the tweets just in case they disappeared

[]: Re: Minor news about Shin Evangelion: 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Oct 24, 2019 2:57 pm Joseki wrote: Thank you very much for posting it here Well, they should sell the "uncut" version in the BD then.
